ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee works in */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role or position of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the employee is based */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date when the employee joined the company */,
  "date_of_leaving" TEXT /* Date when the employee left the company (if applicable) */,
  "salary" REAL /* Employee's salary for reference in tax calculations */,
  "employee_type" TEXT /* Type of employee (e.g., full-time, part-time, contractor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "perquisites" (
  "perquisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each perquisite */,
  "perquisite_name" TEXT /* Name of the perquisite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the perquisite */,
  "taxable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the perquisite is taxable */,
  "perquisite_type" TEXT /* Type of perquisite (e.g., accommodation, vehicle, utility) */,
  "perquisite_value" REAL /* Base value of the perquisite */,
  "perquisite_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the perquisite (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "perquisite_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the perquisite (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perquisite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_perquisites" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the perquisite */,
  "perquisite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the perquisite */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the perquisite as per company rules */,
  "recovered_amount" REAL /* Amount recovered from the employee */,
  "taxable_amount" REAL /* Amount of the perquisite chargeable to tax */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the perquisite */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the perquisite */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the perquisite (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the perquisite (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_perquisites_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_perquisites_perquisite_id FOREIGN KEY ("perquisite_id") REFERENCES perquisites ("perquisite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the department is based */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department for perquisites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the role belongs to */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the role (e.g., 50000-70000) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Applicable tax rate for the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "tax_regulation" TEXT /* Reference to the tax regulation document for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rule */,
  "perquisite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the perquisite the rule applies to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the rule applies to */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the perquisite */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax rule becomes effective */,
  "tax_rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the tax rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rules_perquisite_id FOREIGN KEY ("perquisite_id") REFERENCES perquisites ("perquisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rules_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "perquisite_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "perquisite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the perquisite */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "previous_value" REAL /* Previous value of the perquisite */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value of the perquisite */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_perquisite_history_perquisite_id FOREIGN KEY ("perquisite_id") REFERENCES perquisites ("perquisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_perquisite_history_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_perquisite_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES system_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., tax form, agreement) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_documents_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, finalized) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES system_users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the EBMS */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the module was accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "module_description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES system_users ("user_id")
)
